title: Sküllbox
subtitle: Dungeons · Mayhem · Magyk
description:
Take on the role of sentient, punk skulls who need to use psychotic traps and weird contraband to keep wanna-be heroes from taking their stuff.

**SKULLBOX** is a punk rock-inspired zine that contains an entire rules-lite game designed to bring fun and absurd stories to your table. It has a unique engine at its core that can be learned in just a couple of minutes, requires only six-sided dice, and is designed to be played as a fun one-shot or a short yet absurd campaign.

_Skullbox was successfully Kickstarted and supported by more than 400 amazing backers._

extra_products.title: Sküllbox: Halloween Tricks
extra_products.description:
Halloween has come at last, and it’d be the best time of the year if it weren’t for those Everblissians and their darned sweet tooth! They’ve come to take our candy, and with Baba Yaga’s help, they might be able to take our GOLDEN APPLE OF DISCORD too. Use this special SKÜLLBOX DLC to put the trick into trick-or-treat!

Contains:

- 4 new boxes, like the curs’d Anubox and the violently fun Box o’ Chainsaws!
- 4 new monsters, one from each category.
- A new boss: BABA YAGA!

**NOTE**: This is an optional downloadable content for the SKÜLLBOX game, the full game, which includes the rules, can be downloaded here: [https://shardstone.itch.io/skullbox](https://shardstone.itch.io/skullbox),

extra_products.title: Kickstarter rewards
extra_products.description: The Kickster physical edition came with a few other goodies like character sheets in a custom envelope, a skull pin, and a sticker.
